summary: Full stack testing of UNIVERSE indie cinema platform. All 21 backend tests passed. All 5 main screens and auth flows verified via Playwright. App is fully functional.

minor.issue: JWT_SECRET is hardcoded in server.py (24 bytes, below recommended 32 bytes for SHA256). InsecureKeyLengthWarning logged at startup.

react_native_issues.issue: shadow* and textShadow* style props deprecated in newer RN - use boxShadow and textShadow. Non-critical warnings.
useNativeDriver not supported in web preview - falls back to JS animation. Non-critical for web.

action_items: Consider moving JWT_SECRET to environment variable with 32+ bytes length
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET is hardcoded in server.py - should be in .env for security
seed_data_creation: Seed data was pre-seeded on startup. TEST_ user and review created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fresh MVP, all features working. Backend: auth, films (10 with short/medium/long types), reviews, posts, film-seen all working. Frontend: Welcome screen with galaxy/stars, Login with demo creds, Home with 3 sections + genre filters, Feed TikTok-style with like/info/review/seen buttons + bottom sheet modal, Social with posts and create post modal, Search with text + duration + genre filters, Profile with Instagram stats + 4 tabs (Top10/Critiques/FilmsVus/Réalisés) + Settings page, Film detail with synopsis/reviews/mark-seen/write-review all working.
